ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 平面 (常数 x / y / z)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Switch between 2D function plots and 3D surface plots.
ast.target: 在 2D 函数图和 3D 曲面图之间切换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 显示在图表上方的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of the exported TikZ image.
ast.target: 导出的 TikZ 图像的宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of the exported TikZ image.
ast.target: 导出的 TikZ 图像的高度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the pgfplots package in the TikZ code.
ast.target: 在 TikZ 代码中包含 pgfplots 包。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cartesian uses f(x). Polar uses r(theta) and plots r in radians. Polar mode is 2D only.
ast.target: 笛卡尔坐标使用 f(x)。极坐标使用 r(theta) 并以弧度绘制 r。极坐标模式仅限 2D。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of the live preview, in pixels. Does not affect the exported TikZ dimensions. Scroll on the preview to zoom and drag to pan.
ast.target: 实时预览的宽度，以像素为单位。不影响导出的 TikZ 尺寸。在预览上滚动可缩放，拖动可平移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tilt: 0 looks at the surface edge-on, 90 looks straight down. Drag preview or press up/down arrows.
ast.target: 倾斜：0 表示从边缘观察曲面，90 表示从正上方俯视。拖动预览或按上/下箭头键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Camera rotation around the vertical axis. Drag preview or press left/right arrows.
ast.target: 相机绕垂直轴的旋转。拖动预览或按左/右箭头键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Equal: each axis spans the same length on screen - the bounding box is a perfect cube. True: edge lengths scale with the data ranges (xmax-xmin, ymax-ymin, zmax-zmin), so an axis with a much larger range dominates the box. The exported pgfplots adds `axis equal image` when Equal is selected.
ast.target: 相等：每个轴在屏幕上跨越相同的长度 - 边界框是一个完美的立方体。真实：边长根据数据范围（xmax-xmin, ymax-ymin, zmax-zmin）缩放，因此范围大得多的轴会主导边界框。导出的 pgfplots 在选择“相等”时会添加 `axis equal image`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In polar mode this edits a separate polar X label so your cartesian label stays intact.
ast.target: 在极坐标模式下，此项编辑单独的极坐标 X 标签，因此您的笛卡尔坐标标签保持不变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In polar mode this edits a separate polar Y label so your cartesian label stays intact.
ast.target: 在极坐标模式下，此项编辑单独的极坐标 Y 标签，因此您的笛卡尔坐标标签保持不变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sample every enabled function and set the axis ranges so the curves fit comfortably inside the plot. Clips outliers so vertical asymptotes do not blow out the range.
ast.target: 对每个启用的函数进行采样，并设置轴范围，使曲线舒适地适合绘图内部。裁剪异常值，使垂直渐近线不会使范围过大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Box: full rectangle around the plot. Middle: axes cross at origin. Axes: L-shape (x at bottom, y at left) with no enclosing box.
ast.target: 框：绘图周围的完整矩形。中间：坐标轴在原点相交。坐标轴：L 形（x 在底部，y 在左侧），没有封闭框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use x. Supports +, -, *, /, ^, parentheses, and Math.* functions.
ast.target: 使用 x。支持 +、-、*、/、^、括号和 Math.* 函数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to reference this function from Tools (e.g. area between curves). Defaults to f1, f2, …
ast.target: 用于从工具（例如曲线之间的面积）引用此函数。默认为 f1, f2, …

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Second component when parametric. The Expression field above becomes x(t). Domain is the t range.
ast.target: 参数化时的第二个分量。上面的表达式字段变为 x(t)。定义域是 t 的范围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use x and y. Supports +, -, *, /, ^, parentheses, and Math.* functions.
ast.target: 使用 x 和 y。支持 +、-、*、/、^、括号和 Math.* 函数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Approximate number of major grid cells across the X axis. The Y axis follows proportionally.
ast.target: X 轴上主要网格单元的大致数量。Y 轴按比例跟随。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display minor coordinate grid lines between the major ones.
ast.target: 在主要网格线之间显示次要坐标网格线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of minor subdivisions between two major grid lines.
ast.target: 两条主要网格线之间的次要细分数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Off (default): drag down tilts the scene up (camera elevation rises), drag up tilts the scene down - the trackball convention. On: drag down lowers the camera, drag up raises it - direct manipulation.
ast.target: 关闭（默认）：向下拖动使场景向上倾斜（相机仰角升高），向上拖动使场景向下倾斜 - 轨迹球惯例。开启：向下拖动降低相机，向上拖动升高相机 - 直接操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Upper bound of the Samples slider on each 3D surface card. Default 80. Higher values draw smoother surfaces but each axis step squares the work, so the preview will slow noticeably above ~200. Re-open the Easy TikZ modal after changing this.
ast.target: 每个 3D 曲面卡片上“采样”滑块的上限。默认为 80。更高的值绘制更平滑的曲面，但每个轴步长会平方增加工作量，因此在约 200 以上预览会明显变慢。更改此设置后请重新打开 Easy TikZ 模态框。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 同时渲染纯 `tikz` 代码块

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: x 值、最小值或最大值

ast.name: setText
ast.source: This looks like raw TikZ / pgfplots code rather than an Easy TikZ JSON block. Install obsidian-tikzjax (or similar) to render it, or recreate the chart via the Easy TikZ modal.
ast.target: 这看起来像是原始的 TikZ / pgfplots 代码，而不是 Easy TikZ JSON 块。请安装 obsidian-tikzjax（或类似插件）来渲染它，或通过 Easy TikZ 模态框重新创建图表。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Compute axis ranges from the current functions
ast.target: 根据当前函数计算轴范围

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not locate the original chart in the source file (it may have been edited). Inserting at the cursor instead.
ast.target: 无法在源文件中找到原始图表（可能已被编辑）。改为在光标处插入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active note to insert into.
ast.target: 没有活动笔记可供插入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: SVG 已复制到剪贴板（透明背景）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not copy SVG to the clipboard.
ast.target: 无法将 SVG 复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PNG copied to clipboard (transparent background, 2x resolution).
ast.target: PNG 已复制到剪贴板（透明背景，2倍分辨率）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Power. Equivalent to ** in JavaScript. x^2 means x squared.
ast.target: 幂运算。等同于 JavaScript 中的 **。x^2 表示 x 的平方。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 分组。始终用括号包裹分数，例如 1/(x+1)。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Inverse tangent of y/x with correct quadrant.
ast.target: y/x 的反正切，考虑正确的象限。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 自然对数（以 e 为底）。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 以 2 和 10 为底的对数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Same as a^b. Useful when one operand is itself complex.
ast.target: 等同于 a^b。当其中一个操作数本身很复杂时很有用。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 绝对值、符号函数（-1、0 或 1）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Very thin, Thin, Thick, Very thick. Affects the rendered TikZ output and the live preview equally.
ast.target: 极细、细、粗、极粗。对渲染的 TikZ 输出和实时预览均有影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Draws the curve as a dashed line rather than a solid stroke.
ast.target: 将曲线绘制为虚线而非实线。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Shades the region between the curve and the x-axis. When enabled, a Fill pattern dropdown (solid, horizontal/vertical lines, crosshatch, dots, diagonals) and a Fill opacity slider appear.
ast.target: 为曲线与 x 轴之间的区域着色。启用后，会出现填充图案下拉菜单（纯色、水平/垂直线、交叉线、点、对角线）和填充不透明度滑块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adds the expression to the legend box in the upper-right of the plot.
ast.target: 将表达式添加到绘图右上角的图例框中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Bisection root-finder on f - g across the overlap of both function domains. Each crossing gets a dot; optional (x, y) label.
ast.target: 在 f - g 的交集定义域上使用二分法求根。每个交点都会有一个点；可选 (x, y) 标签。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Line at x = c or y = c spanning the plot. Color, thickness, dashed, optional label.
ast.target: 在 x = c 或 y = c 处绘制贯穿绘图的直线。可设置颜色、粗细、虚线、可选标签。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Outline + optional fill between (x₁, y₁) and (x₂, y₂). Patterns supported.
ast.target: 在 (x₁, y₁) 和 (x₂, y₂) 之间绘制轮廓和可选填充。支持图案。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Center (cx, cy), radius r. Drawn in axis coordinates so the radius scales with the axes.
ast.target: 圆心 (cx, cy)，半径 r。在轴坐标系中绘制，因此半径会随轴缩放。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Straight line between two points with optional forward / backward / both arrows.
ast.target: 两点之间的直线，可选向前/向后/双向箭头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Curly brace between two points with optional label centered above. Useful for marking intervals.
ast.target: 两点之间的花括号，上方居中可选标签。用于标记区间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Flat plane at constant x, y, or z. Color + opacity.
ast.target: 在恒定 x、y 或 z 处的平面。颜色 + 不透明度。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Single point at (x, y, z) with optional label, or a line segment between two 3D points with optional arrows.
ast.target: 位于 (x, y, z) 的单个点，带可选标签，或两个 3D 点之间的线段，带可选箭头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each axis gets its own range.
ast.target: 每个轴都有自己的范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Same palette as 2D. The surface is shaded from the base color toward white based on z value.
ast.target: 与 2D 调色板相同。曲面根据 z 值从基色向白色渐变着色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Renders only the grid lines of the surface, no fill. Useful when stacking multiple surfaces.
ast.target: 仅渲染曲面的网格线，无填充。在叠加多个曲面时很有用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Slider from 0.1 to 1.0. Affects the filled surface; wireframes use the opacity for stroke transparency.
ast.target: 滑块范围从 0.1 到 1.0。影响填充曲面；线框使用该不透明度作为描边透明度。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Grid density per axis (8 to 80). Higher = smoother surface, slower preview. Also drives pgfplots `samples=` in the exported code.
ast.target: 每轴的网格密度（8 到 80）。越高 = 曲面越平滑，预览越慢。同时驱动导出代码中 pgfplots 的 `samples=` 参数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The default. Copies the pgfplots source to the clipboard.
ast.target: 默认选项。将 pgfplots 源代码复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copies the live SVG with a transparent background. Paste into Inkscape, Figma, or directly into Obsidian as . CSS variables are resolved so the file renders correctly outside the plugin.
ast.target: 复制带有透明背景的实时 SVG。可粘贴到 Inkscape、Figma 或直接作为 粘贴到 Obsidian 中。CSS 变量已解析，因此文件在插件外部也能正确渲染。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Rasterises the SVG at 2x resolution and copies a PNG to the clipboard, also with a transparent background. Paste into any image-aware app.
ast.target: 以 2 倍分辨率将 SVG 栅格化，并将 PNG 复制到剪贴板，同样带有透明背景。可粘贴到任何支持图像的应用中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Inserts an `easy-tikz` JSON code block into the active note; the plugin renders it inline via its own SVG renderer - no external TikZ plugin required. Clicking the rendered chart reopens this modal pre-filled.
ast.target: 将 `easy-tikz` JSON 代码块插入活动笔记；插件通过其自身的 SVG 渲染器内联渲染它 - 无需外部 TikZ 插件。点击渲染的图表会重新打开此预填充的模态框。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mouse wheel zooms in or out around the cursor. Zoom updates xmin/xmax/ymin/ymax, so the generated TikZ code reflects what you see.
ast.target: 鼠标滚轮围绕光标进行缩放。缩放会更新 xmin/xmax/ymin/ymax，因此生成的 TikZ 代码反映了您所看到的内容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Click and drag inside the preview to pan. Like zoom, this updates the axis ranges and round-trips into the code.
ast.target: 在预览区域内单击并拖动以进行平移。与缩放类似，这会更新轴范围并往返到代码中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On the Graph tab. Sets the live preview width in pixels. The exported TikZ size is controlled by Width and Height (cm) and stays independent.
ast.target: 在图表选项卡上。设置实时预览宽度（以像素为单位）。导出的 TikZ 大小由宽度和高度（厘米）控制，并保持独立。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: 0 is edge-on (looking along the y-axis), 90 is straight down.
ast.target: 0 是侧视图（沿 y 轴观察），90 是俯视图。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Rotation of the camera around the vertical axis (0 to 360).
ast.target: 相机绕垂直轴旋转（0 到 360）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The expression could not be evaluated. Common causes: missing operator (write 2*x not 2x), unbalanced parentheses, undefined name (you typed Tan instead of tan).
ast.target: 无法计算该表达式。常见原因：缺少运算符（写 2*x 而不是 2x）、括号不平衡、未定义的名称（您输入了 Tan 而不是 tan）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adjust the Y range on the Axis tab. Values outside the range are clipped.
ast.target: 在“轴”选项卡上调整Y轴范围。超出范围的值将被裁剪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The x value you entered is not inside the function domain. Check the Domain field on the same card.
ast.target: 您输入的x值不在函数定义域内。请检查同一卡片上的“定义域”字段。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The expression returned NaN or Infinity at every sample. Most often log of a negative number, or division by zero across the whole grid.
ast.target: 表达式在每个采样点都返回了NaN或Infinity。这通常是由负数的对数运算或整个网格上的除以零操作引起的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The 2D renderer uses 500 samples; the 3D renderer uses a 40x40 grid. Both are fixed. For smoother output, narrow the domain so the same samples cover a smaller range.
ast.target: 二维渲染器使用500个采样点；三维渲染器使用40x40的网格。两者都是固定的。为了获得更平滑的输出，请缩小定义域，使相同的采样点覆盖更小的范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Anything from the JavaScript Math namespace is also accessible explicitly, e.g. Math.tan(x). The bare names above are just shortcuts.
ast.target: JavaScript Math命名空间中的任何内容也可以显式访问，例如Math.tan(x)。上面列出的裸名称只是快捷方式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If an expression fails to evaluate, you will see a transient toast at the top of the screen. The Code tab still updates.
ast.target: 如果表达式求值失败，您将在屏幕顶部看到一个临时提示。代码选项卡仍会更新。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Values whose absolute size exceeds 10x the Y axis range are dropped, so tan(x) near pi/2 will not blow out the chart.
ast.target: 绝对值超过Y轴范围10倍的值将被丢弃，因此tan(x)在pi/2附近不会使图表溢出。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You can tweak the generated TikZ before copying or inserting. Settings changes overwrite your edits unless the textarea is focused.
ast.target: 您可以在复制或插入之前调整生成的TikZ代码。除非文本区域处于焦点状态，否则设置更改会覆盖您的编辑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Click any tab and the active state follows you as you scroll. Tab clicks smooth-scroll to that section.
ast.target: 点击任意选项卡，活动状态会随您滚动而跟随。点击选项卡会平滑滚动到该部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether the graph is in 2D or 3D
ast.target: 图表是二维还是三维的

ast.name: description
ast.target: 显示在图表上方的名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: The width of the final image in cm

ast.name: description
ast.source: The height of the final image in cm

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to show labels for axes

ast.name: description
ast.source: Box (all around), Middle (crossing at origin), or Axes (L-shape at lower-left)
ast.target: 框（四周环绕）、中（在原点交叉）或轴（左下角呈L形）

ast.name: name
ast.source: min(a, b)  max(a, b)  hypot(a, b)
ast.target: min(a, b)  max(a, b)  hypot(a, b)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Curve disappears off the top or bottom.

ast.name: name
ast.target: 错误会以通知形式显示。
